Adapted to local llms, vlm, gguf such as llama-3.3 Janus-Pro, Linkage graphRAG

description: Multi-LLM agent framework with Claude Code-like tools. Use DeepSeek, Claude, GPT, Llama, or any model — same tools, same skills, swap freely. Includes file editing, code search, shell execution, sub-agents, and a production-ready API. The missing SDK between your LLM and your codebase.
name: toolloop

description: AI teaching Skill based on the Feynman Technique — makes YOU teach the AI to expose gaps in your understanding. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any LLM agent framework.
name: feynman-tutor
